Module org.flossware.commons
Package org.flossware.commons.util

Class PropertyUtil

java.lang.Object
org.flossware.commons.util.PropertyUtil
public final class PropertyUtil extends Object
Properties utility class.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Scot P. Floess

  • Method Details

    • fromInputStream

      public static Properties fromInputStream(InputStream inputStream, boolean closeStream)
      Load properties from an input stream.
      Parameters:
      inputStream - the input stream to read from
      closeStream - whether to close the stream after reading
      Returns:
      Properties object loaded from the stream
      Throws:
      CommonsIOException - if reading fails
      Since:
      1.0

    • fromInputStream

      public static Properties fromInputStream(InputStream inputStream)
      Load properties from an input stream without closing it.
      Parameters:
      inputStream - the input stream to read from
      Returns:
      Properties object loaded from the stream
      Throws:
      CommonsIOException - if reading fails
      Since:
      1.0

    • fromResource

      public static Properties fromResource(String resource)
      Load properties from a classpath resource.
      Parameters:
      resource - the resource path to load from
      Returns:
      Properties object loaded from the resource
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if resource parameter is null
      CommonsIOException - if resource cannot be found or read
      Since:
      1.0

    • fromReader

      public static Properties fromReader(Reader reader, boolean closeReader)
      Load properties from a reader.
      Parameters:
      reader - the reader to read from
      closeReader - whether to close the reader after reading
      Returns:
      Properties object loaded from the reader
      Throws:
      CommonsIOException - if reading fails
      Since:
      1.0

    • fromReader

      public static Properties fromReader(Reader reader)
      Load properties from a reader without closing it.
      Parameters:
      reader - the reader to read from
      Returns:
      Properties object loaded from the reader
      Throws:
      CommonsIOException - if reading fails
      Since:
      1.0

    • fromFile

      public static Properties fromFile(File file)
      Load properties from a file.

      SECURITY: This method validates against path traversal attacks (CWE-22). Use with caution when accepting file paths from untrusted sources.

      Parameters:
      file - the file to load properties from
      Returns:
      Properties object loaded from the file
      Throws:
      FileException - if the file cannot be read or path traversal is detected
      Since:
      1.0

    • fromFile

      public static Properties fromFile(String filename)
      Load properties from a file specified by path.

      SECURITY: This method validates against path traversal attacks (CWE-22). Paths containing ".." components or attempting to escape the parent directory are rejected. Use with caution when accepting file paths from untrusted sources.

      Parameters:
      filename - the path to the properties file
      Returns:
      Properties object loaded from the file
      Throws:
      FileException - if the file cannot be read or path traversal is detected
      Since:
      1.0
